prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约5662→15639→8762→8082→7739，2022年因试卷难度变化出现异常高位次后，近3年持续前移（位次数字减小），累计前移约7900名；2025年基准约7739名，为近年最低位次，反映报考热度持续升温；本省物理类计划2021–2024年均为246–247人，2025年增至262人；2026年计划266人，较2025年小幅扩招约1.5%，扩招幅度有限，对竞争格局影响较小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜2026年排名第27位，近年排名稳定在23–27名区间，属于全国顶尖高校行列；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，原校长张尧学因涉嫌严重违纪被查，可能对报考心理产生轻微抑制；抖音综合热度排名第85位（一般），短视频曝光量中等；2024年曾出现录取断档信号，但2025年已基本恢复；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共13个学科：冶金工程A+、护理学A+、材料科学与工程A、计算机科学与技术A-、临床医学A-、交通运输工程A-、土木工程A-、机械工程A-、控制科学与工程A-、化学工程与技术A-、基础医学A-、管理科学与工程A-、马克思主义理论A-；其中计算机、临床医学、材料等与招生专业直接对应，学科实力强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续高热（2024年热度指数76–77），临床医学、口腔医学推荐度稳定；安徽省2026年普通高考总人数约45.1万，按近年物理类占比约69%估算约31.1万人，较2025年物理类32.1万人略降约3%，竞争压力略有缓解，2025年物理类本科批461分、特殊类型514分，近年波动不大；中南大学位于湖南长沙，与安徽同属中部地区，地域偏好适中；该校在安徽省招生人数约占全国总计划的4%–5%，属中等偏上水平，非本省高校但招生规模稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年小幅扩招（+1.5%）、考生总数略降、计算机/电子信息等热门专业持续高热、学校声誉偏负面轻微抑制等因素，考虑考生规模略降的缓解效应与热门专业热度的推升效应相互抵消后，预测2026年物理类最低位次约7830名，较2025年基准7739名微幅后移约91名（位次数字增大），波动区间7330–8330名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 5662 → 15639 → 8762 → 8082 → 7739. In 2022, due to changes in exam difficulty, there was an abnormally high ranking, but in the past three years, the ranking has been moving forward continuously (ranking number decreasing), with a cumulative forward movement of about 7900 places. The 2025 baseline is approximately 7739, the lowest ranking in recent years, reflecting a continuous increase in application popularity. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 246–247 from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 262 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 266, a slight expansion of about 1.5% compared to 2025, with limited expansion impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranks 27th, with recent rankings stable in the 23–27 range, belonging to the top tier of national universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, as former president Zhang Yaoxue is under investigation for serious disciplinary violations, which may mildly suppress application psychology. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 85th (average), with moderate short video exposure. In 2024, there were signs of admission gaps, but by 2025, it had largely recovered. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 13 disciplines rated A- or above: Metallurgical Engineering A+, Nursing A+, Materials Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Clinical Medicine A-, Transportation Engineering A-, Civil Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, Basic Medicine A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, and Marxist Theory A-. Among them, Computer Science, Clinical Medicine, and Materials directly correspond to enrollment majors, with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly popular (2024 popularity index 76–77), while Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have stable recommendation levels. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Anhui Province is approximately 451,000, with an estimated 311,000 in the Physics Category based on a recent proportion of about 69%, a slight decrease of about 3% compared to 321,000 in 2025, easing competition pressure slightly. In 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch score was 461, and the special type score was 514, with little fluctuation in recent years. Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan, which is in the same central region as Anhui, with moderate regional preference. The university's enrollment in Anhui Province accounts for about 4%–5% of its total national plan, which is moderately high, and although it is not a provincial university, its enrollment scale is stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+1.5%), a slight decrease in the total number of candidates, the sustained high popularity of hot majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information, and the mild suppression from the university's negative reputation, and taking into account the offsetting effects of the slight decrease in candidate numbers (easing effect) and the push from hot major popularity, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 7830, a slight backward movement of about 91 places (ranking number increase) from the 2025 baseline of 7739, with a fluctuation range of 7330–8330.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult)

- Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Artificial Intelligence.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Automation (Automation and Electrical)

- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program)
- Stomatology (Five-Year Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Materials (Metallurgy and Materials)
- Chemical Engineering and Pharmaceutical
- Mechanical Engineering
- Transportation
- Engineering Experimental Class (Rail Transit Construction and Maintenance/Biomedicine/New Energy/AI).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 7330–8330, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (≤7330), you can focus on aiming for top Tier 1 majors like Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program and Computer Science. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (≥8000), you should use Tier 3 majors like Materials and Chemical Engineering as safety options while striving for popular engineering majors in Tier 2 like Electronic Information and Automation. Central South University's disciplines such as Metallurgy, Materials, and Nursing are rated A+, and although they have lower social popularity, their disciplinary strength is top-notch, making them suitable for candidates interested in related fields to achieve a high score with a lower ranking.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 938 → 1037 → 924 → 1050 → 1238, showing an overall backward trend (increasing ranking number). Over the past 3 years, the cumulative backward shift is about 314 places. The 2025 baseline is approximately 1238, the highest ranking in the past 5 years (most difficult to enter), reflecting continuously rising application popularity. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 23 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and the 2026 plan is 22 students, a slight reduction of about 4.3% compared to 2025, intensifying competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university. Ranked 27th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 23–27 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of national universities. The reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative; the incident of former president Zhang Yaoxue being investigated may have a mild suppressive effect on application psychology. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 85th (average), with moderate short video exposure. There was a signal of admission gaps in 2024, but it has largely recovered by 2025. There are relatively few liberal arts-related advantageous disciplines; Marxist Theory A- is the strongest liberal arts discipline. Majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, etc., do not individually have A- or higher ratings, but Central South University's overall disciplinary strength is strong.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has social heat recommendation (2024 heat index 63.5, differentiation and wait-and-see), Chinese Language/Literature recommended (heat 67.4), Finance/Banking/Economics differentiation and wait-and-see (heat 65.5). The total number of candidates for the 2026 Anhui Province general college entrance examination is about 451,000, with the history category accounting for approximately 31% in recent years, estimated at about 140,000 people, basically flat compared to the 2025 history category of 141,000. In 2025, the history category undergraduate batch line was 477 points, special type line 515 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan, in the same central region as Anhui, with moderate regional preference. The university's liberal arts enrollment in Anhui Province is stable at 22–23 students, a small but consistently stable proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (-4.3%), basically flat total candidate numbers, stable popularity of liberal arts majors like Law and Chinese Language, and the mild suppressive effect of slightly negative university reputation, along with the intensified competition due to enrollment reduction, the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 history category is approximately 1221, a slight forward shift of about 17 places (decreasing ranking number) compared to the 2025 baseline of 1238, with a fluctuation range of 1038–1404.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law
- Finance (Economics and Management Category, including International Economics and Trade, Finance, Business Administration, Accounting).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Chinese Language and Literature Category (including Chinese Language and Literature, Digital Publishing)
- Digital Publishing (International Communication Excellence Talent Cultivation Pilot Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Foreign Languages and Literature Category (including English, French, Japanese, Spanish).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted range of 1038–1404, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Chinese Language and Literature Category as the main choice, with Tier 1 Law and Finance Category as reach options, and Tier 3 Foreign Languages and Literature Category as safety. If ranking is better than the lower limit (≤1038), focus on reaching for Law; if ranking is near the upper limit (≥1300), use Tier 3 foreign language majors as safety. Central South University has few liberal arts majors (only 4), with clear ranking gradients among majors: Law and Finance Category have historically the best rankings, Chinese Language and Literature Category is in the middle, and Foreign Languages and Literature Category is relatively easier.
